active_slice: OUT-02 Local Fixture Output Proof Smoke v0

notes: OUT-02 creates a synthetic local fixture proof package only.
No source URL, external media, network fetch, OAuth/API, yt-dlp, or upload path is used.
The proof is diagnostic readback, not production render or public-use approval.

proof_readback.reason: OUT-02 closes the portable proof-artifact gap with a tracked synthetic fixture package: manifest JSON, readback JSON, edit-pack JSON, SRT, Markdown, and static HTML timeline.

capability_matrix.missing_input: Real source_video/source_audio materials remain absent for this slice.
capability_matrix.next_local_action: Use a later approved local-material or private-fetch smoke slice for real source proof.
capability_matrix.notes: OUT-02 uses synthetic fixture data only; it does not prove real media availability.

capability_matrix.missing_input: A real or reviewed transcript for an actual target source is still absent.
capability_matrix.next_local_action: Link selected cuts to real transcript rows only after local material/transcript approval.
capability_matrix.notes: Fixture subtitles prove readback shape, not STT or transcript quality.

capability_matrix.missing_input: A real edit_pack connected to reviewed transcript and source media remains absent.
capability_matrix.next_local_action: Use OUT-03 to connect selected_cut_ids to proof/readback artifacts.
capability_matrix.notes: Fixture edit pack carries selected cuts, timing, speakers, subtitles, and reasons.

capability_matrix.missing_input: Production subtitle design and real subtitle timing review remain absent.
capability_matrix.next_local_action: Keep subtitle design acceptance separate from fixture proof and real output review.
capability_matrix.notes: Fixture SRT is diagnostic readback only.

capability_matrix.missing_input: None for the synthetic fixture proof package.
capability_matrix.next_local_action: Use OUT-03 to link selected cuts to the proof surface.
capability_matrix.notes: OUT-02 closes the portable proof artifact gap without external media.

capability_matrix.missing_input: A reviewable thumbnail brief/output artifact tied to selected source materials.
capability_matrix.next_local_action: Promote thumbnail brief seed fields into an operator-reviewable output-layer artifact later.
capability_matrix.notes: Thumbnail output remains a separate planning/readback lane.

capability_matrix.missing_input: A target episode with local media or existing source audio material.
capability_matrix.next_local_action: Build a read-only local preview pack once operator-supplied material exists.
capability_matrix.notes: Preview pack is useful readback, but it is not this fixture proof or a rendered video proof.

capability_matrix.missing_input: A validated edit_pack with selected cuts and optional transcript refs.
capability_matrix.next_local_action: Export CSV/JSON/HTML cut-list readback for human review or NLE handoff.
capability_matrix.notes: NLE export proves edit structure, not final encoded video.

capability_matrix.missing_input: Real or approved local source video/audio and edit_pack inputs for an encoded diagnostic proof.
capability_matrix.next_local_action: Run a narrow diagnostic render only after local materials are explicitly available.
capability_matrix.notes: OUT-02 is a static fixture proof; production render remains out of scope.

capability_matrix.missing_input: Rights acceptance, publication judgment, account/OAuth setup, and public target selection.
capability_matrix.next_local_action: Keep public/upload out of local proof work; prepare only decision packets for human review.
capability_matrix.notes: This is a true gate, not a missing local automation task.

gap_log.missing_input: Closed for synthetic fixture proof; real media proof remains a separate gap.
gap_log.why_it_matters: Reviewers now have a tracked, inspectable proof package instead of only a readiness inventory.
gap_log.local_vs_true_gate: Local fixture gap closed; no rights/publication gate crossed.
gap_log.validation: Parse manifest/readback/edit-pack JSON and inspect proof_timeline.html.

gap_log.missing_input: Real source_video/source_audio materials are absent from this proof.
gap_log.why_it_matters: A synthetic proof does not verify pixels, audio, file metadata, or source-ledger linkage.
gap_log.local_vs_true_gate: Local gap until operator-supplied material or an approved private fetch smoke exists.
gap_log.validation: A later run records material ids and leaves git ls-files episodes empty.

gap_log.missing_input: Real or reviewed transcript rows for a target source are absent.
gap_log.why_it_matters: Fixture subtitles prove package shape, not transcript alignment or STT quality.
gap_log.local_vs_true_gate: Local gap; transcript work can remain diagnostic while rights/public gates stay closed.
gap_log.validation: Transcript-linked selected cuts preserve production/public flags as false.

gap_log.missing_input: No production render or production subtitle burn-in acceptance exists.
gap_log.why_it_matters: OUT-02 is static readback, not an encoded final output.
gap_log.local_vs_true_gate: Diagnostic render can be local; production acceptance is a separate human gate.
gap_log.validation: Any later render manifest keeps production_candidate=false until accepted.

gap_log.why_it_matters: Local diagnostic success cannot become production/public permission.
gap_log.local_vs_true_gate: True gate; requires explicit human-owned approval.
gap_log.validation: rights_approved remains false until a dedicated acceptance record exists.

gap_log.missing_input: Publication approval, account/OAuth, and target channel remain absent.
gap_log.why_it_matters: A local proof must not drift into public action or upload readiness.
gap_log.local_vs_true_gate: True gate; local automation can only prepare review packets.
gap_log.validation: Upload/public fields stay blocked until human-owned acceptance is recorded.

gap_log.missing_input: A selected-cut-to-proof link is not yet represented as a first-class output route.
gap_log.why_it_matters: The proof is inspectable, but reviewers still need a direct route from selected_cut_ids to proof artifacts.
gap_log.local_vs_true_gate: Local action; it should still avoid source fetching and public publication.
gap_log.validation: Readback links selected_cut_ids to proof_timeline.html and JSON artifacts.

recommended_next_slice.goal: Link selected cut ids to local proof/readback artifacts so a reviewer can move from an edit decision to the exact proof surface without hunting.
recommended_next_slice.why_next: OUT-02 proves the portable fixture package shape. The next shortest output-layer unlock is connecting selected cuts to that proof surface while real source, transcript, production render, rights, and upload gates remain separate.
evidence_basis: fixture_edit_pack.json now carries selected cut ids and subtitle draft rows.
proof_timeline.html now gives a human-readable segment/readback surface.
video_output_gap_log.json still records real source and public gates as open gaps.
validation: Confirm proof_timeline.html references the fixture manifest and selected cuts.
Keep external_media_used, network_used, fetch_authorized, rights_approved, public_ready, and production_ready false.
Confirm git ls-files episodes remains empty.

true_gates.reason: Rights, publication judgment, account/OAuth, and public destination are human-owned decisions.
A later local-material or explicitly approved private fetch slice can provide real source media without making public or rights claims.

validation_plan: Confirm proof_timeline.html exists and references the proof data without a video player or execution controls.
Run targeted pytest coverage for the output proof/report and asset-fetch boundary smoke.
Run git diff --check and confirm git ls-files episodes is empty.
